ops.title: channelsetup hoisted to cc-interact v0.10.0; consumers deduped
ops.body:
Review feedback on the channel-delivery ship ("make sure we're not duplicating what cc-interact does") led to hoisting the channel-approval flow both consumers had hand-rolled.

**Hoisted into cc-interact (tag v0.10.0, commit cad1ea2a7018):**
- `channelsetup` package: `Plugin{Marketplace, Name}` identity (`ChannelID()` = `plugin:<name>@<marketplace>`, `Source(server)` = `plugin:<name>:<server>`); strict `ManagedHasEntry` (approved only when `channelsEnabled == true` AND allowlist entry); `MergeManaged` with a typed error on wrong-typed `allowedChannelPlugins` and a null-object guard; injection-proof `ApplyManagedViaAdmin` (shell-quote + AppleScript-escape, golden `TestAdminScriptQuoting`; the non-darwin `sudo install` fallback is shellQuoted too — a review finding); exported `Offer(p, markerPath, managedPath)` single-sourcing the machine-contract reason strings "already offered" / "already approved" / "channel not yet approved".
- `cmd.SetupChannelsCmd(d, plugin, applyHint)`: hidden `setup-channels`, `--check`/`--apply`/`--decline` genuinely mutually exclusive, `--check` prints `{"offer":bool,"reason":string}`.
- `paths.Paths.ChannelSetupMarkerPath()` → `<state-dir>/channels-setup.json` (`{status, version}` shape unchanged; existing installs unaffected).
- `channel.Instructions` / `channel.ReceiveProtocol` prose templates (free-form `Source`; Traffic is a subject-and-verb clause so consumers keep their exact first paragraph).

**Deliberately NOT hoisted:** `MergeUserSettings`/`UserSettingsPath` (inert — the settings `channels` key never fed Claude's session channel gate; only the `--channels` launch flag does); consumer channelTools/spawnBrief domain prose; plugin manifests; `backend.ShellQuote` stays in cc-orchestrate (the hoisted package carries its own unexported ~12-line copy, deliberate duplication).

**Consumer adoptions:** cc-orchestrate 7da2dcb10710 (spawnBrief byte-identical; only the instructions closer gained the standard "never speaks unsolicited" lead-in). cc-review 9aa7f04f8f5a (`--apply` no longer writes `~/.claude/settings.json`; allowlisted-but-`channelsEnabled:false` machines re-offer; injection bug fixed by deletion; `start_test.go` byte-unchanged). All CI green; dedup grep proves zero local copies remain; live checks: cco → "already offered", cc-review → "already approved".
